# BKK Songkran

> The ultimate guide to Songkran 2026 in Bangkok, Thailand. Festival dates, lineups, survival tips, water fight zones, and community meetups.

## What is this site

BKK Songkran (bkksongkran.com) is a travel guide for Songkran 2026 in Bangkok. It covers the three major ticketed festival events (S2O, Siam Songkran, GCircuit), free street celebrations, practical survival tips, and a community meetup board for travellers.

Songkran is Thailand's New Year water festival, celebrated April 10–14 in Bangkok. It is the world's largest water fight.

## Pages

- [Home](https://bkksongkran.com/) — Overview, featured festivals, top blog posts
- [Events](https://bkksongkran.com/events) — All Songkran 2026 events: S2O, Siam Songkran, GCircuit, street parties, cultural events
- [Blog / Guide](https://bkksongkran.com/blog) — 12 in-depth articles covering what to do, where to go, what to pack
- [Survival Kit](https://bkksongkran.com/survival-kit) — Interactive packing checklist for Songkran
- [Heat Map](https://bkksongkran.com/map) — Water fight zone map across Bangkok
- [Who's Going?](https://bkksongkran.com/meetup) — Community board where travellers sign up to meet others at events
- [Ticket Exchange](https://bkksongkran.com/tickets) — Peer-to-peer board for buying and selling festival tickets
- [AI Guide](https://bkksongkran.com/ai) — GPT-4o powered Songkran assistant
- [Gay & LGBTQ+ Guide](https://bkksongkran.com/gay-guide) — GCircuit, Silom, LGBTQ+ Songkran scene

## Key facts

- Songkran 2026 dates in Bangkok: April 10–14, 2026
- S2O Songkran Festival: April 11–13, S2O Land (Ratchada), ฿1,800–฿2,500
- Siam Songkran Music Festival: April 12–14, Bravo BKK Arena (RCA), ฿1,500–฿2,000
- GCircuit Bangkok Songkran Party: April 11–13, UOB Live Hall (Emsphere), ฿2,800–฿4,900
- Best free water fight zones: Silom Road, Siam Square, RCA, Khao San Road area
- Best transport: BTS Skytrain (extended hours), avoid Grab 2pm–8pm due to surge pricing
